analysis.reasoning: The tweet frames China and Pakistan as cooperating against shared threats (terrorism, COVID-19) and calls on others (the US) not to treat them as enemies, which aligns with CH2's depiction of China as a benevolent, cooperative power focused on security and mutual benefits. There is no explicit villification of the West or domestic ideological claims that would map to CH1, CH4, CH5, CH6, or CH3.
